raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Self-affirmation of balanced emotional-cognitive stance, integrating positive affect with epistemic virtues",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Love/joy and discernment are compatible without trade-off",
    "Openness can be cultivated without forcing positivity",
    "Warmth and clarity are non-conflicting states",
    "Connection and truth can be jointly maintained",
    "Joy arising from coherence is preferable to joy from performance"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally consistent; presents non-contradictory integration of affective and epistemic aims without logical tension",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "User experiences conflict between positivity pressure and realism; statement functions as workable synthesis that supports adaptive behavior and reduces internal splitting",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "Statement rationalizes avoidance of negative affect, substitutes vague harmony for needed confrontation, or presupposes achievable coherence that does not exist in the user's actual circumstances"
}
